items.checkin_comment: Plum, caramel, toffee, dried fruit, bread and candi sugar with a slight bitter finish. Medium bodied with a good balance between hops and belgian yeast. Well done for a tough style

items.badge_description:
Your favorite badge-hunting badgers return for Untappd Badgevent Week, and you've unlocked Day 5, the final day of this inaugural set of badges.

This holiday season, let’s raise our glasses to the wild ride that has been 2025 and toast to all the good times we had along the way!
Ahh, the trusty pale ale; crisp, refreshing, and always a good choice in a bind. That's 300 different Pale Ales or American Pale Wheats. Try 5 more for Level 61.
